properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 79/14
BARENTS SEA
BA CHARTS AFFECTED: BA2228; BA2683 AND BA3180

A YELLOW BUOY (SIZE 1 BY 2M) WITH STROBE FLASHING LIGHT AND APPROXIMATELY 8000 M OF SEISMIC CABLE ATTACHED HAS BEEN 
LOST ON 17.07.2014  AT 21:18 UTC IN POSITION LAT: 7206.2N; LONG: 03409.1E AND IS DRIFTING WITH APPROXIMATE DRIFT 
DIRECTION 135 AND APPROXIMATE SPEED 1.5 TO 2 KN. 
THE GUARD VESSEL AQUARIUS G (MMSI 356987000) STAYS IN VICINITY OF DRIFTING EQUIPMENT.
THE GUARD VESSEL AQUARIUS G IS LISTENING TO VHF CH 16 AND 74.

ALL VESSELS OPERATING IN VICINITY ARE REQUESTED TO KEEP SHARP LOOKOUT TO AVOID COLLISION WITH DRIFTING EQUIPMENT.
